name: Suspicious PowerShell Execution
xql_query: dataset = xdr_data | filter action_process_image_name contains "powershell.exe" | filter action_process_image_command_line contains "-enc" | limit 100

name: Administrator File Execution
xql_query: dataset = xdr_data | filter action_process_username =~ "Administrator" | filter event_type = PROCESS_START | limit 100

name: Malicious Domain Connection
description: Detect connections to known malicious domains

name: Registry Persistence
mitre_tactic_id: T1547 - Boot or Logon Autostart Execution

name: Fileless Attack Detection
xql_query: dataset = xdr_data | filter event_type = MODULE_LOAD | filter action_file_name contains "powershell.exe" | filter action_process_image_command_line contains "-nop -w hidden" | limit 100

name: Suspicious Download
description: Detect files downloaded from external sources
